title: ononis viscosa f. cavanillesii
intro: Ononis viscosa f. cavanillesii is a subspecies of the sticky wild candytuft plant, native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its sticky stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa f. cavanillesii include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb to create teas, salves, and other remedies that leverage its medicinal properties.
